Mallikarjun Reddy Dorsala

Academic | Blockchain Systems | Distributed Computing

Home Contact Projects Publications Research Teaching

I am an academic and researcher working in the areas of blockchain systems, zero-knowledge proofs, federated learning, and decentralized architectures.

My research focuses on building scalable, transparent, and trustless systems for next-generation digital infrastructure.

Research interests

  • Blockchain systems
  • Zero-knowledge proofs
  • Federated learning
  • Decentralized finance
  • Distributed systems

  • Developing XComb platform
  • Working on blockchain-enabled federated learning
